result_summary.description: A central circle containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one below), flanked on the left and right by curved bracket-like shapes resembling '{' and '}' or fish-tail figures.
A simple icon of a sewing button: a black circle outline with four small filled dots arranged in a square pattern inside, representing button holes.
A circle containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), flanked by what appear to be Greek letters tau (τ) on the left and chi (χ) on the right.
A circle containing three small dots arranged in a triangular face-like pattern (two dots on top, one dot below), resembling a simple face or emoticon symbol.
A black-outlined circle containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face or button.
A circular face-like icon with two dark dots (eyes) and a small mark below, accompanied by a black rectangular shape to the right. Appears to be a stylized face emoji or pictogram.
A circle containing two dots arranged horizontally on top and one dot centered below them, forming a simple face pattern. Flanked by partial dark characters or letterforms on either side.
A small circular icon containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face or ellipsis button
